Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril shares his love of mushrooms with these recipes.
Video.title: Wild Mushrooms

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates Louisiana blue crabs. (Did you know Louisiana is the country's biggest producer?)
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: Emeril shares the accessible and sustainable virtues of southern caviar.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: After a visit to Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Emeril, Lindsey Brower, and Nan Wallis create a mouth-watering meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: Dallas Cowboys superfan Jesse Prado, aka Big Brother, creates Tex-Mex barbecue with a Louisiana kick.
Video.title: Dallas

Video.summary: Celebrate Cleveland's roots with a Polish-inspired tailgate menu.
Video.title: Cleveland Browns

Video.summary: Gaufrette Potatoes Topped with Cilantro Cream, New Potatoes with Grated Truffles
Video.title: Truffles

Video.summary: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present these hearty recipes.
Video.title: Cooking Local, Cooking Fresh

Video.summary: Emeril creates dishes with heart-healthy nutrients.
Video.title: Heart-Healthy Meals

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how easy it is to make fresh pasta at home.
Video.title: Homemade Pasta

Video.summary: Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: BBQ Salmon Gravlax, Coho Salmon en Papillote, Warm Smoked Salmon Salad
Video.title: Salute to Salmon

Video.summary: Comfort Foods: Spiked Hot Chocolate, Wild Cream of Mushroom Soup
Video.title: Comfort Foods

Video.summary: Emeril and interns Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter take on dishes made at Cafe Reconcile. Get ready to try Emeril's classic Crab Cakes, Fried Green Tomatoes, and Pineapple Cornbread.
Video.title: with Asia Magree, Chassidy Carter

Video.summary: At the next home game, turn classic dinner dishes into a fancy tailgate meal.
Video.title: Jacksonville Jaguars

Video.summary: Texas Style BBQ Ribs, Nola Ribs, BBQ Shrimp with Jalapeno Biscuits
Video.title: BBQ

Video.summary: Sweet Pie Dough, Old Fashioned Crisp, Wrapped Cobblers
Video.title: Cooking with Crust

Video.summary: Oysters Rockefeller, Oyster Soup
Video.title: Oysters

Video.summary: Fried Oyster Po Boy, Grilled Shrimp Po Boy, Muffuletta Po Boy
Video.title: Po Boy

Video.summary: Cajun Jambalaya, Shrimp Creole
Video.title: Jambalaya

Video.summary: Fish Covered in Parchment Paper, Shellfish with Sausage and Broth
Video.title: Papillote

Video.summary: Smoked Salmon, Poached Eggs, Grit Cakes, New Orleans Eggs, Eye Openers
Video.title: Brunch

Video.summary: Preparing and Curing Gravlax, Lemon and Dill Gravlax, Serving Gravlax
Video.title: Gravlax and Salmon

Video.summary: Chocolate-Pecan Fudge Cake, Chocolate Genoise with Raspberry Filling
Video.title: Chocolate

Video.summary: Emeril will how you how to create authentic Mexican flavors.
Video.title: Tamales

Video.summary: With the help of Fleisher's Grass-Fed and Organic Meats butchers, Emeril prepares steak two ways.
Video.title: Butchers' Favorite Cuts

Video.summary: Emeril prepares "kicked-up" sandwiches with the Radio City Rockettes.
Video.title: Kicked-Up Sandwiches

Video.summary: Steamed Mussels, Smoked Mussel Fritters, BBQ Mussel Po' Boys, Olive Mussels
Video.title: Mucho Mussels
